name: networking-engineering
description: Networking-engineering team — 2 agents (network-architect, network-implementation-engineer) for enterprise, campus, and data-center networks: L2/L3 design (VLANs, STP, routing), dynamic routing (OSPF, BGP path selection & policy), DNS/DHCP/IPAM, load balancing & NAT, firewalls & segmentation, SD-WAN & overlays (VXLAN/EVPN), zero-trust network access, and NetDevOps automation (IaC for network, config drift, CI validation). Knowledge bank with two Mermaid decision trees (routing-protocol choice, subnet/segmentation design) + a dated 2026 tooling map, 5 skills, 5 best-practices, 3 templates, 1 advisory hook. Seams: cloud VPC/VNet -> aws-cloud/azure-cloud/gcp-cloud; firewall appsec verdicts -> security-engineering; reliability/observability of the network -> observability-sre; Kubernetes CNI/service mesh -> cloud-native-kubernetes. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
